memory.summary: I have a free afternoon with minimal stress, but my term project is barely started and due Thursday. A relaxing leisure option and a quick chore are available to manage my energy.
I completed a trivial 1-hour chore with minimal stress, gaining only 0.09 progress on my term project which remains barely started due Thursday.
After a short win, I realize the afternoon is slipping by while my term project remains barely started despite low stress.
A trivial 30-minute win increased my progress slightly, yet the term project remains barely started as the deadline approaches Thursday.

I spent half an hour on a trivial chore, increasing my progress to 0.36, but the term project remains barely started with only two hours of sleep debt and high stress.
The trivial win nudged progress to 0.38, but the term project remains untouched despite rising stress and sleep debt.
A trivial win increased progress to 0.40, yet the term project remains untouched despite accumulating sleep debt and high stress.
The trivial win raised progress to 0.42, yet the term project remains untouched while sleep debt and stress continue to accumulate.
I gained 0.01 progress on a trivial task, but the term project remains untouched despite rising stress and sleep debt.
